lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Ramon! Move! The sheep are acting strange!

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: ...They're always strange.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Use the arrow keys or A/D to move. Press Space to jump!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Jump, Ramon! You've done it a thousand times!

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Don't remind me.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: That wall looks climbable... if you jump at it!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Press into a wall and jump to wall-jump. It might lead somewhere good!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Ramon, look out! That sheep has glowing red eyes!

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Possessed livestock. Just my luck.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Try hitting it with your sling! Press J to swing it!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: It's dark in there! I'll stay close.

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Sa Cova des Foner... the slinger's cave. My ancestors trained here.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: He's blocking! Try hitting him harder... or from the side!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Hold J to charge your sling for a stronger shot!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: That target is too far for a normal swing...

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Maybe if you hold the sling longer... try holding J until it glows bright!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: We need to go UP! Try jumping off the walls!

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Es Talayot Sagrat... my people built these. Never thought I'd climb one from the inside.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: That one's big! Watch out for its swing!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Stone guardians hit hard but they're slow. Watch for the wind-up!

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: The ground here looks crumbly... but nothing happens when we jump on it.

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Needs more force than my feet. We'll come back.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Something feels wrong here... the ground is shaking.

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Sa Porta des Bou. The gate of the bull. Stay close.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: There's a lot of supplies here. Stock up before we go further.

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Someone left these here for a reason. Probably a warning.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: The pillars... they're carved with bulls! And the ground won't stop shaking!

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Es Bou de Pedra is beyond that gate. Ready your stones.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Bon dia, Ramon! Welcome to the test level.

lines.speaker: ramon
lines.text: Another cursed place. Let's get this over with.

lines.speaker: bep
lines.text: Press Enter to advance dialogue. Use Arrow Keys to move!
